lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਹ ਰਚਹੁ ਤਹ ਤਹ ਬੰਧਨ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man bin har jeh rachahu teh teh bandhan paeh |
lines.english: O mind: without the Lord, whatever you are involved in shall bind you in chains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਤਹੂ ਨ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਸਾਕਤ ਤੇਊ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jih bidh katahoo na chhootteeai saakat teaoo kamaeh |
lines.english: The faithless cynic does those deeds which will never allow him to be emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤੇ ਕਰਮ ਰਤ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਭਾਰੁ ਅਫਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau karate karam rat taa ko bhaar afaar |
lines.english: Acting in egotism, selfishness and conceit, the lovers of rituals carry the unbearable load.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਉ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਤਉ ਏਊ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: preet nahee jau naam siau tau eaoo karam bikaar |
lines.english: When there is no love for the Naam, then these rituals are corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਧੇ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਜੇਵਰੀ ਮੀਠੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਰੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: baadhe jam kee jevaree meetthee maaeaa rang |
lines.english: The rope of death binds those who are in love with the sweet taste of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਕੇ ਮੋਹੇ ਨਹ ਬੁਝਹਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਦਹੂ ਸੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: bhram ke mohe neh bujheh so prabh sadahoo sang |
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, they do not understand that God is always with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੈ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਕਾਚੀ ਭੀਤਿ ਨ ਸੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: lekhai ganat na chhootteeai kaachee bheet na sudh |
lines.english: When their accounts are called for, they shall not be released; their wall of mud cannot be washed clean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਤਿਹ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬੁਧਿ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jiseh bujhaae naanakaa tih guramukh niramal budh |9|
lines.english: One who is made to understand - O Nanak, that Gurmukh obtains immaculate understanding. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਰਾਤੇ ਰੰਗ ਏਕ ਕੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੂੜਾ ਰੰਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo raate rang ek kai naanak goorraa rang |1|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Love of the One Lord, O Nanak, take on the deep and lasting color of His Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੂਟੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਜਾਸੁ ਕੇ ਹੋਆ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: ttootte bandhan jaas ke hoaa saadhoo sang |
lines.english: One whose bonds are cut away joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਰੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਕਹੈ ਨ ਕੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: re re daragah kahai na koaoo |
lines.english: In the Court of the Lord, no one shall speak harshly to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਜਪੁ ਰਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu jap rasanaa |
lines.english: Meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har - chant it with your tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰਾ ਰੰਗਹੁ ਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਅਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: raaraa rangahu eaa man apanaa |
lines.english: RARRA: Dye this heart of yours in the color of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਉ ਬੈਠੁ ਆਦਰੁ ਸੁਭ ਦੇਊ ॥
lines.translit: aau baitth aadar subh deaoo |
lines.english: Everyone shall welcome you, saying, "Come, and sit down."

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਨਹ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਨਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran neh hoe binaasaa |
lines.english: There is no birth or death, or destruction there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਮਹਲੀ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਤੂ ਬਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: auaa mahalee paaveh too baasaa |
lines.english: In that Mansion of the Lord's Presence, you shall find a home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਲਿਖਿਓ ਧੁਰਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: masatak karam likhio dhur jaa kai |
lines.english: One who has such karma written on his forehead,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚ ਝੂਠ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਆਪਤ ਮੂੜੇ ਅੰਧ ॥
lines.translit: laalach jhootth bikaar moh biaapat moorre andh |
lines.english: Greed, falsehood, corruption and emotional attachment entangle the blind and the foolish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਪੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਘਰਿ ਤਾ ਕੈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: har sanpai naanak ghar taa kai |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, has the wealth of the Lord in his home. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਦ ਮਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: ahanbudh maaeaa mad maate |
lines.english: they are drunk with the wine of egotistical intellect and Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਲਾ ਲਪਟਿ ਬਿਖੈ ਰਸ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: lalaa lapatt bikhai ras raate |
lines.english: LALLA: People are entangled in the love of corrupt pleasures;

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਗਿ ਪਰੇ ਦੁਰਗੰਧ ਸਿਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਬੰਧ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: laag pare duragandh siau naanak maaeaa bandh |1|
lines.english: Bound down by Maya, O Nanak, a foul odor clings to them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਊ ਊਨ ਨ ਕੋਊ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: koaoo aoon na koaoo pooraa |
lines.english: No one is perfect, and no one is imperfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਹਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਮਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: eaa maaeaa meh janameh maranaa |
lines.english: In this Maya, they are born and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਤਿਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau hukam tivai tiau karanaa |
lines.english: People act according to the Hukam of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਦਾ ਅਲਿਪਨਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tthaakur sadaa alipanaa |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, our Lord and Master is forever detached. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਊ ਸੁਘਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਊ ਮੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: koaoo sughar na koaoo mooraa |
lines.english: No one is wise, and no one is foolish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਗਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit jit laavahu tith tit laganaa |
lines.english: Wherever the Lord engages someone, there he is engaged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਅਥਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: laal gupaal gobind prabh gahir ganbheer athaah |
lines.english: My Beloved God, the Sustainer of the World, the Lord of the Universe, is deep, profound and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਸਰ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਵਰ ਕੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੇਪਰਵਾਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: doosar naahee avar ko naanak beparavaah |1|
lines.english: There is no other like Him; O Nanak, He is not worried. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਅਵਰ ਨਹ ਹੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: ekeh aap avar neh hoaoo |
lines.english: He Himself is the One; there shall never be any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਲਾ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਕੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: lalaa taa kai lavai na koaoo |
lines.english: LALLA: There is no one equal to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵਨਹਾਰੁ ਹੋਤ ਸਦ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hovanahaar hot sad aaeaa |
lines.english: He is now, He has been, and He shall always be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦੀਨੋ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਅਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau deeno har ras apanaa |
lines.english: That one, unto whom the Lord has given His Love

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਪੁਰਖ ਸਭ ਠਾਊ ਜਾਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: pragatt purakh sabh tthaaoo jaane |
lines.english: The Lord, the Primal Being, is known by everyone everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: auaa kaa ant na kaahoo paaeaa |
lines.english: No one has ever found His limit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਟ ਹਸਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਪੂਰ ਸਮਾਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: keett hasat meh poor samaane |
lines.english: In the ant and in the elephant, He is totally pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਤਿਹ ਜਪਨਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh har har tih japanaa |12|
lines.english: - O Nanak, that Gurmukh chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਸੁ ਜਿਹ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aatam ras jih jaaniaa har rang sahaje maan |
lines.english: One who knows the taste of the Lord's sublime essence, intuitively enjoys the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧਨਿ ਧਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਜਨ ਆਏ ਤੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak dhan dhan dhan jan aae te paravaan |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed, blessed, blessed are the Lord's humble servants; how fortunate is their coming into the world! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਸਫਲ ਤਾਹੂ ਕੋ ਗਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aaeaa safal taahoo ko ganeeai |
lines.english: How fruitful is the coming into the world, of those

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਬਸਹਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਕੈ ਸੰਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: aae baseh saadhoo kai sange |
lines.english: They come and dwell with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਰਸਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਭਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jaas rasan har har jas bhaneeai |
lines.english: whose tongues celebrate the Praises of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਰੰਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naam dhiaaveh range |
lines.english: night and day, they lovingly meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਮਹਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aavat so jan naameh raataa |
lines.english: Blessed is the birth of those humble beings who are attuned to the Naam;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦਇਆ ਮਇਆ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau deaa meaa bidhaataa |
lines.english: the Lord, the Architect of Destiny, bestows His Kind Mercy upon them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਹਿ ਆਵਨ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ekeh aavan fir jon na aaeaa |
lines.english: They are born only once - they shall not be reincarnated again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਾਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: yaas japat man hoe anand binasai doojaa bhaau |
lines.english: Chanting it, the mind is filled with bliss; love of duality is eliminated, and pain, distress and desires are quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਦਰਸਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak har kai daras samaaeaa |13|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are absorbed into the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਦਰਦ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਬੁਝੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dookh darad trisanaa bujhai naanak naam samaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, immerse yourself in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||
